name: cluster('https://luciatrainingplatform.westcentralus.kusto.windows.net/').database('production').table('PreNodeStatusRecord')
description: Contains records of node statuses captured before a specific event or process, including timestamp, host, status, node ID, and endpoint.

schema.description: The timestamp when the status was recorded.
The name of the host where the status was recorded.
The unique identifier of the node.
